impact: This gives the daemon a deterministic prompt snippet requiring the next worker to inspect and reuse committed PP&D contracts before proposing any similarly named new module after repeated parser or compile failures, reducing duplicate contract churn and syntax-recovery loops.
summary: Add focused PP&D daemon prompt guidance for repeated parser failures on domain tasks.
target_task: Task checkbox-119: Task checkbox-114: Add daemon prompt guidance that, after repeated parser failures on a PP&D domain task, requires the next worker to reuse existing committed contracts before proposing a new similarly named module.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
